_notes: Sidecar metadata for Nick's hand-captured hearing aid photo batches. One entry per bag (B01, B02, ...). Used to seed brand/model labels for the active-learning loop without renaming files. Fields are loose — add what's known, leave the rest.

C25.source_files: IMG_1251.HEIC – IMG_1260.HEIC (pulled from iPhone over USB via pymobiledevice3 afc)
C25.notes: Silver/grey BTE pair with slim tubing ending in custom-moulded clear domes. Likely fitted to a previous user — moulded dome is user-specific. Oticon Ino vintage ~2011-2013, so this is older inventory — adds vintage diversity vs the catalog dataset.
